---
name: debug-lemonade
description: Diagnose lemonade-server (lemond) problems on the Strix Halo box — server not responding on its port, models missing from Open WebUI, a model failing to load, slow inference, or ROCm/Vulkan/GPU questions. Use when lemonade or lemond is broken.
keywords: [lemonade, lemond, server, model, gpu, rocm]
---

# Debug lemonade-server

Diagnose lemond: port not responding, models missing, a model that won't load, slow
inference, or GPU/ROCm/Vulkan trouble on the Strix Halo machine.
